name: ham-dvbt2-445_5mhz
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y git cmake g++ libboost-all-dev libvolk2-dev soapysdr-tools soapysdr-module-lms7 limesuite libiio-utils gnuradio-dev python3-pip && pip3 install pandas matplotlib && git clone https://github.com/drmpeg/gr-dvbt2.git /opt/gr-dvbt2 && cd /opt/gr-dvbt2 && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc) && make install && ldconfig && git clone https://github.com/drmpeg/gr-dvbs2rx.git /opt/gr-dvbs2rx && cd /opt/gr-dvbs2rx && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc) && make install && ldconfig'
